title: Capitals of Countries
description: A tougher world-capitals round with fewer giveaway questions and more quiz-night depth.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Belize?
questions.hint: It replaced Belize City as capital after a devastating hurricane.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Benin?
questions.hint: It is not Cotonou, which is the economic centre.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Bhutan?
questions.hint: It lies in a valley in the western part of the country.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Botswana?
questions.hint: It begins with G and is near the South African border.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Burundi?
questions.hint: It replaced Bujumbura as political capital in 2019.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Cambodia?
questions.hint: It sits at the confluence of the Mekong and Tonle Sap rivers.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Cameroon?
questions.hint: It is not Douala.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Colombia?
questions.hint: It is on a high plateau in the Andes.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of the Democratic Republic of the Congo?
questions.hint: It faces Brazzaville across the Congo River.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Ecuador?
questions.hint: It is one of the highest official capitals in the world.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Ethiopia?
questions.hint: It is also the headquarters of the African Union.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Fiji?
questions.hint: It is on the island of Viti Levu.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Georgia?
questions.hint: It stands on the Kura River.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Guatemala?
questions.hint: It shares its name with the country.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Honduras?
questions.hint: Its name begins with T.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Kazakhstan?
questions.hint: It has previously been called Nur-Sultan.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Kyrgyzstan?
questions.hint: It begins with B and lies near the Tian Shan mountains.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Laos?
questions.hint: Its name means 'city of sandalwood'.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Lithuania?
questions.hint: It is famous for its baroque old town.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Madagascar?
questions.hint: It is often shortened to Tana in conversation.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Malawi?
questions.hint: It replaced Zomba as capital.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Moldova?
questions.hint: It begins with C and is also spelled Chisinau in English.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Mongolia?
questions.hint: It is one of the coldest capitals in the world.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Myanmar?
questions.hint: It replaced Yangon as the official capital in 2005.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Namibia?
questions.hint: Its name suggests moving air.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Nicaragua?
questions.hint: It lies on the south shore of Lake Managua.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Nigeria?
questions.hint: It replaced Lagos as the capital in 1991.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Oman?
questions.hint: It is a port city on the Gulf of Oman.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Panama?
questions.hint: It shares its name with the country.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Paraguay?
questions.hint: It lies on the Paraguay River.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of the Philippines?
questions.hint: It is part of the National Capital Region.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Romania?
questions.hint: It is the country's largest city and financial centre.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Rwanda?
questions.hint: It is known for its cleanliness and hills.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Senegal?
questions.hint: It is on the Cap-Vert peninsula.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Slovenia?
questions.hint: Its name begins with L and includes a soft 'j' sound.

questions.prompt: What is the administrative capital of South Africa?
questions.hint: It is not Cape Town or Bloemfontein.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Sri Lanka?
questions.hint: It is not Colombo.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Suriname?
questions.hint: It lies on the Suriname River.

questions.prompt: What is the de facto capital of Switzerland?
questions.hint: It is not Zurich or Geneva.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Tajikistan?
questions.hint: Its name literally means 'Monday'.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Tanzania?
questions.hint: It is not Dar es Salaam.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Turkmenistan?
questions.hint: It begins with A and is known for white marble buildings.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Uganda?
questions.hint: It is built over a series of hills.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Uruguay?
questions.hint: It lies on the Rio de la Plata.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Uzbekistan?
questions.hint: It is the largest city in Central Asia by population.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Zambia?
questions.hint: It begins with L and is on a plateau in the south-central part of the country.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Zimbabwe?
questions.hint: It was once called Salisbury.

questions.prompt: What is the official capital of Ivory Coast?
questions.hint: It is not Abidjan.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of New Zealand?
questions.hint: It lies at the southern end of the North Island.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Canada?
questions.hint: It sits on the border of Ontario and Quebec.
